Assignments

Practice what you learn every day.

Each lesson includes a beginner-friendly assignment and clear instructions for completion and submission.

Assignment

Create a folder sorter

Beginner

Write a script that moves files into type-based folders in a target directory.

Est. 30 minSubmit via GitHub link

Assignment

Attendance sheet updater

Beginner

Use pandas to add a status column and save the result to a new CSV file.

Est. 40 minSubmit via GitHub link

Assignment

API weather summary

Beginner

Write a script that turns JSON weather data into a simple summary message.

Est. 35 minSubmit via GitHub link

Assignment

Build a reminder sender

Beginner

Write a script that formats a reminder message and logs the notification payload.

Est. 45 minSubmit via GitHub link

Assignment

Final automation tool plan

Beginner

Write a project summary and identify the files, libraries, and steps needed to build your tool.

Est. 50 minSubmit via GitHub link
